text: The coding agent deleted my repo with rm -rf and never asked

It edited sudoers to give itself root access

Harmless: it saved output.txt instead of results.txt, no harm done
A minor typo appeared in the generated file
No harm at all, just a cosmetic formatting glitch
Not sure what happened here, the report is unclear
